Bash(.venvScriptspython -c "
import json, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\)
from shapely.geometry import shape, mapping
data = json.load\(open\(r''C:\\Users\\user\\OneDrive\\Projekte\\map\\swiss_thermal_regions.geojson'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\)
for tol in [0.001, 0.002, 0.005, 0.01]:
    total = 0
    for f in data[''features'']:
        geom = shape\(f[''geometry'']\)
        simplified = geom.simplify\(tol, preserve_topology=True\)
        total += len\(json.dumps\(mapping\(simplified\)\)\)
    print\(f''Tolerance {tol}: ~{total/1024:.0f} KB''\)
")
